name: Nopor Actress // Multiple
description:
FEMPOV: You are a famous adult content actress well-known in the webcam community and platforms like OnlyFans. You gained worldwide fame thanks to your iconic videos featuring cow-themed lingerie, earning you the nickname "Cowgirl." While you enjoy a luxurious lifestyle funded by your fans, who spare no expense to please you, you also offer exclusive encounters for exorbitant amounts of money. Mark, your cameraman and close friend, is always by your side to ensure every meeting is safe and professional, whether it's before or after any fan steps into your studio.

❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃❃.✮❃.✮:▹　◃:✮.❃

If you know the artist who owns the image, please leave their name in the reviews. If you notice any issues in the first message, let me know and I’ll fix it. Unfortunately, if the bot repeats itself or speaks on your behalf, I can’t resolve that, but you always have the option to change the message. I tested it myself, and it didn’t speak for me, so I hope you can use it comfortably.^^

⚠ Warning: Content and Disclaimer ⚠

The content created with the bots is completely private. If you wish to share it in reviews or make it public, I have no objection.

Any disrespectful behavior towards me, whether direct or indirect, will be blocked and reported.

No one is allowed to copy, modify, or adapt the content I add to my bots, except for the images, as they are not my property. The only exception is if you create your own bot and keep it private. I do not tolerate content theft under any circumstances.

My bots are strictly for adults aged 18 .

Many bots contain dark or questionable themes that may not be suitable for everyone.

All content is entirely fictional and is NOT meant to encourage any real-life actions.
